query: SELECT s.id, s.name FROM stores s WHERE s.name LIKE '%Treasure%' OR s.name LIKE '%treasure%';
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT s.id, s.name FROM stores s WHERE s.name LIKE '%Treasure%' OR s.name LIKE '%treasure%';
